title: He And She.
content:
"Should one of us remember,
    And one of us forget,
    I wish I knew what each will do -
    But who can tell as yet?"

    "Should one of us remember,
    And one of us forget,
    I promise you what I will do -
    And I'm content to wait for you,
    And not be sure as yet."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Christina Georgina Rossetti delivers a powerful performance in "He And She."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
